    """
    # get the distance from start to end
    distance = graph[start][end]
    # get the path from start to end
    path = [end]
    # traverse the graph
    for i in range(len(graph[start])):
        # traverse the graph
        if graph[start][i] != 0:
            if graph[i][end] + graph[start][i] < distance:
                # update the distance and path
                distance = graph[i][end] + graph[start][i]
                path = path + [i]
    # return the result
    return distance, path
